briefs.title: A24 indie drama — closing montage
briefs.brief: Need an emotional, organic vocal-led track for a 90-second closing montage. Sparse arrangement, real instruments, a sense of quiet resolution. One sync, festival + theatrical.

briefs.title: Nike — global running campaign
briefs.brief: High-energy, anthemic instrumental or hook-driven track for a 60s hero spot plus cutdowns. Big drop, propulsive rhythm. Worldwide, all media, 1 year.

briefs.title: Netflix teen series — title sequence
briefs.brief: Catchy, slightly melancholy pop with a memorable vocal hook for a recurring title card. Gen-Z feel. Per-episode license across one season.

briefs.title: Luxury EV — reveal trailer
briefs.brief: Cinematic build from minimal pulse to a full release at the car reveal. Modern, premium, restrained. Global digital + broadcast, 6 months.

briefs.title: Indie game — exploration theme
briefs.brief: Loopable, evolving ambient bed for open-world exploration. No hard vocal hooks; texture over melody. Buyout for in-game use.

briefs.title: Beauty brand — social campaign
briefs.brief: Sunny, mid-tempo feel-good track with a warm female vocal for a 6-week social/paid campaign. Relatable, not too polished. Social + paid, 6 months.

briefs.title: Documentary series — recurring theme
briefs.brief: Honest, rootsy vocal track to anchor a 6-part docuseries about working musicians. Authentic, lived-in. Series license, all media.

briefs.title: League playoffs — broadcast promo
briefs.brief: Hard-hitting, chant-ready anthem with attitude for playoff promos. Big drums, quotable hook. Broadcast + digital, playoff window.
